zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevin是Johne Stevin的女兒，於1528年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪。她於1549年11月23日與Alexander Drysdale在英國蘇格蘭金洛-爾圖利波爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年在她的家鄉享年87歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stevin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Colum, Sinead.
Irish (Donegal and Tyrone): variant of   Slavin  .

variants.name: Slavin
meanings: Irish (Tyrone and Monaghan): shortened form of O'Slavin, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sléibhín ‘descendant of Sléibhín’, a name probably derived from a diminutive of sliabh ‘mountain’ (perhaps originally a short form of Donnshléibhe; see Dunleavy ).
Jewish (from Belarus): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Slave (from the Slavic word slava ‘glory, fame, praise’) + the Slavic possessive suffix -in.
English: from Middle English sclavin(e) ‘pilgrim's cloak or mantle’ (Old French esclavine), applied as a nickname perhaps for a pilgrim, or for someone who made or sold such garments.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevin was born in 1528, in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland as the daughter of Johne Stevin. She married Alexander Drysdale on 23 November 1549, in Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1615, in her hometown, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevin est née en 1528, à Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, fille de Johne Stevin. Elle a épousé Alexander Drysdale le 23 novembre 1549, à Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1615, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevin wurde 1528 in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Johne Stevin geboren. Sie hat am 23. November 1549 in Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander Drysdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1615 im Alter von 87 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevin è nata il nel 1528 nel Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland come figlia di Johne Stevin. Lei sposato Alexander Drysdale il 23 novembre 1549, nel Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1615, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevinは1528年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアバーディーンでJohne Stevinの娘として生まれた。1549年11月23日にイギリススコットランドキンロス-シュアイアトゥリーボルでAlexander Drysdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年に故郷で87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevin(은)는 1528년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 압르디에서 Johne Stevin의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1549년 11월 23일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨로스-실르 툴리볼일에서 Alexander Drysdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 그녀의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevin nasceu em 1528, em Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland filha de Johne Stevin. Ela casou-se com Alexander Drysdale em 23 de novembro de 1549, em Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1615, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevin родилась в 1528 г. в местности абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия. Её отца звали Johne Stevin. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Drysdale 23 ноября 1549 г. в местности туллиебол, кинросс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1615 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Stevin nació en 1528, en Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland como hija de Johne Stevin. Se casó con Alexander Drysdale el 23 de noviembre de 1549, en Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1615, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años.
